name: Accelerated Charge
description: Kills and assists behind cover grant +30% Signature Ability Charge Efficiency for 8 seconds.

name: Battlelust
description: Taking damage has a 50% chance of granting +6% Weapon Damage for 5 seconds, up to 3 stacks. Talent Cooldown: 1 seconds.

name: Boosted Shield
description: While possessing Extra Health, grants +7.50% Damage Reduction and reduces Skill Cooldown by 1.50%.

name: Crossfire
description: Grants +15% Weapon Damage when Skills are deployed.

name: Deep Focus
description: Grants +28% Skill Duration but also inflicts -10% Skill Radius.

name: Defensive Charge
description: Gaining Extra Health grants +3% Skill Intensity for 10 seconds, up to 5 stacks.

name: Duality
description: Grants +15% Weapon Damage when Health is above 50%. Grants +15% Damage Reduction when Health is below 50%.

name: Emergency Retreat
description: Grants +10% Movement Speed and +37.50% Damage Reduction for 3 seconds while within 20 meters of an enemy. Talent Cooldown: 10 seconds.

name: Energize
description: Using a Medical Kit grants +18% Skill Damage for 8 seconds. Triggering a Skill Multi-Shot refreshes the duration.

name: Energy Drink
description: Using a Medical Kit grants +36% Weapon Critical Hit Chance for 8 seconds.

name: Fearless Charge
description: Sprinting grants +21% Damage Reduction.

name: Glass Cannon
description: Grants +20% Damage. Inflicts -10% Damage Reduction.

name: Hypervigilant
description: Healing grants +5% Damage Reduction for 3 seconds, up to 3 stacks.

name: Injured Concealment
description: Hits taken grant +1.80% Damage for 10 seconds, up to 10 stacks.

name: Instant Triage
description: Downed allies within 30 meters grant +22.50% Damage Reduction and +50% Rescue Efficiency for 10 seconds.

name: Nothing to Lose
description: Taking damage has a 50% chance of reducing Skill Cooldowns of Skills deployed within 5 seconds by 2%, up to 3 stacks.

name: Recycling
description: Taking damage within 20 meters has a 80% chance to refill 4.50 bullets in the magazine (excluding Signature Ability weapons). Talent Cooldown: 1 seconds.

name: Rescue Signal
description: Being downed grants all allies within 40 meters +10% Movement Speed and +100% Rescue Efficiency for 10 seconds. Talent Cooldown: 10 seconds.

name: Second Wind
description: Reloading grants Extra Health equal to 600% Firepower for 5 seconds. Talent Cooldown: 5 seconds.

name: Socialite
description: Grants +10% Movement Speed when there are no enemies within 20 meters. Grants +36% Armor while within 20 meters of an enemy.

name: Suppression Rescue
description: Downed allies within 30 meters grant +22.50% Weapon Damage and +10% Movement Speed for 10 seconds.

name: Suppressive Fire
description: Grants +18% Magazine Size. Reloading grants +6% Rate of Fire for 5 seconds, up to 3 stacks.

name: Territory Expansion
description: Grants +30% Skill Radius while at full Health.

name: Toymaker
description: Grants +15% Skill Multi-shot Chance when there are no enemies within 20 meters.

name: Unflinching
description: Taking damage has a 70% chance of restoring Health equal to 300% Toughness. Talent Cooldown: 2 seconds.
